zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell於1451年7月10日出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素時，他的父親Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire16歲，母親Lady Helen Home15歲。他於1481年2月1日與Lady Janet Douglas結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1508年10月18日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell于1451年7月10日出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire16岁，母亲Lady Helen Home15岁。他于1481年2月1日与Lady Janet Douglas结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1508年10月18日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hepburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham) and Scottish: habitational name from Hepburn in Chillingham (Northumberland), Hebron (Northumberland), or Hebburn in Jarrow (Durham). The placenames probably all derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. Compare Hebron .

variants.name: Eborn
meanings: English (Middlesex, Buckinghamshire, and Oxfordshire): variant of Eburne, itself a possible variant of Hepburn . However, the placename Hepburn comes from northeastern England, and the H- spellings are a late development, which reinforces the suspicion that the name may have a different but unknown derivation.

variants.name: Hebron
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Hebron (Northumberland), possibly from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. See also Hepburn .
Czech: from the Biblical placename (II Samuel 2: 1-3), said to mean ‘alliance’ in Hebrew.

variants.name: Heyburn
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, probably in southern England, named with an unknown first element + Old English burna ‘spring, stream’.
Irish (Ulster): possibly a variant of Scottish   Hepburn  .

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell was born on 10 July 1451, in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire, was 16 and his mother, Lady Helen Home, was 15. He married Lady Janet Douglas on 1 February 1481. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 18 October 1508, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell est né le 10 juillet 1451, à Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Lady Helen Home, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Lady Janet Douglas le 1 février 1481. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1508, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell am 10. Juli 1451 in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire 16 und seine Mutter Lady Helen Home 15. Er hat am 1. Februar 1481 Lady Janet Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1508 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell è nato il il 10 luglio 1451 nel Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Lady Helen Home, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Lady Janet Douglas il 1 febbraio 1481. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 18 ottobre 1508, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwellが1451年7月10日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアヘイレス カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshireは16歳，母Lady Helen Homeは15歳であった。1481年2月1日にLady Janet Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1508年10月18日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell(이)가 1451년 7월 10일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하일레스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Helen Home(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1481년 2월 1일 Lady Janet Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 10월 18일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.10 July 1451–18 October 1508: 10 de julho de 1451–18 de outubro de 1508
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell nasceu em 10 de julho de 1451, em Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Lady Helen Home, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Janet Douglas em 1 de fevereiro de 1481. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1508, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell родился 10 июля 1451 г. в местности хеилесь кастл, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Helen Home, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Janet Douglas 1 февраля 1481 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 18 октября 1508 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.10 July 1451–18 October 1508: 10 de julio de 1451–18 de octubre de 1508
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell nació el 10 de julio de 1451, en Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Lady Helen Home, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Lady Janet Douglas el 1 de febrero de 1481. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1508, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
